articles.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
articles.excerpt: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: Orry Leaves Karan Johar's DCAA for CAN: What This Means for Bollywood 2026
articles.what_this_means: Social media personality Orry has switched from Karan Johar's DCAA to Collective Artists Network, signaling potential expansion into OTT collaborations and major film promotions. For US-based Bollywood fans, this talent management shift could mean more behind-the-scenes access to Netflix India new movies and streaming content coverage.

articles.title: Rajasthan Royals' Riyan Parag Penalised for Vaping During IPL 2025
articles.what_this_means: Riyan Parag faces BCCI disciplinary action for vaping during an IPL 2025 match against Punjab Kings, with the cricket board exploring stringent penalties including fines and possible match bans. Rajasthan Royals management may also face consequences. This incident highlights the BCCI's commitment to maintaining professional conduct standards in India cricket.

articles.title: IPL 2025: Why Fair Cricket Isn't Good for Business, Says Muralidaran
articles.what_this_means: Muralidaran reveals that IPL 2025 prioritizes entertainment and commercial viability over fair playing conditions—a deliberate business strategy. This shift influences how all Indian cricket, including international matches, is evolving and what audiences expect from the sport.

articles.title: Sunrisers Hyderabad Chase 243: Klaasen & Head Lead IPL 2025 Win
articles.what_this_means: Sunrisers Hyderabad proved they're IPL 2025 title contenders by chasing Mumbai Indians' 243 runs with 8 balls to spare. Travis Head's explosive 76 and Heinrich Klaasen's unbeaten 65 dominated the chase. This dominant performance shows why SRH have the firepower to win the tournament.
